# FPUIExtensionErrorCode.failed

**Case**

An error indicating that the action has failed.

## Declaration

```swift
case failed
```

## Error Codes

- **FPUIExtensionErrorCode.userCancelled**: An error indicating that the action was canceled by the user.

items.description: An error indicating that the action was canceled by the user.
items.name: FPUIExtensionErrorCode.userCancelled
